what_it_does: This file is a ledger entry in the channel-memory attachment store that records an image attachment linked to the design-source channel, pointing to the image asset at image://design-source/landing-mockups/p-2.
observations: YAML frontmatter with no body content
Fields: id, channel, attachment_type, target, added
No title, caption, alt text, or author metadata
standouts: References a landing-mockups image asset (p-2) in the design-source channel
Attachment record is purely metadata with no descriptive content
concerns: No description of what the image contains
No provenance beyond the timestamp (no author)
No explicit relationship semantics between the channel and the image
notes: A bare attachment ledger entry that links a landing-page mockup image to the design-source channel without describing its contents.
questions: Who added this attachment and why?
Is there a caption or title for the image elsewhere?
purpose_vs_actual: No explicit purpose is stated; the file actually functions as a typed, timestamped pointer from the design-source channel to an image asset.
intention_signals: It appears intended to associate a landing-page mockup image with the design-source channel so the image can be retrieved in the context of design discussions.
contribution: Provides a timestamped, typed reference that connects the design-source channel to a specific image asset, supporting asset traceability within the channel memory.
summary_for_embedding: A channel-memory attachment ledger entry that references the image asset image://design-source/landing-mockups/p-2 under the design-source channel.
intention_for_embedding: To record and link a landing-page mockup image to the design-source channel for retrieval and context.
